label: Draw Engine
description: Abilities that draw extra cards from your deck

label: Class Synergy
description: Abilities gated by hero class ([hc:X]) conditions

label: Team Synergy
description: Abilities that scale with or require same-team heroes

label: Deck Thinning
description: KO cards from hand or discard to slim your deck

label: Deck Manipulation
description: Reveal, rearrange, or filter top cards of your deck

label: Wound Interaction
description: KO wounds, benefit from wounds, or wound immunity

label: Bystander Rescuer
description: Rescue bystanders or scale based on rescued bystanders

label: Keyword Specialist
description: Primary identity is a set keyword (Berserk, Teleport, Soaring Flight, etc.)
